title: Maybe Monad Pipeline
code:
safeDivide :: Double -> Double -> Maybe Double
safeDivide _ 0 = Nothing
safeDivide x y = Just (x / y)

safeHead :: [a] -> Maybe a
safeHead []    = Nothing
safeHead (x:_) = Just x

compute :: [Double] -> Double -> Maybe Double
compute xs divisor = do
  first <- safeHead xs
  half  <- safeDivide first 2.0
  safeDivide half divisor

main :: IO ()
main = print (compute [10, 20, 30] 3.0)
description: Chains partial functions with `do` notation over the `Maybe` monad. Each step can short-circuit to `Nothing` without explicit checks. Shows how monadic bind (`>>=`) threads failure through a pipeline.
